title: Automated Scan Record
description: A record of an automated scan performed on a prompt package.

scan_id.description: Unique identifier for this scan record.

package_digest.description: The digest of the package that was scanned.

scanner_id.description: The tool or service performing the scan.

evidence_links.description: Optional links to detailed scan logs or evidence.

detailed_report.description: Optional detailed text report from the scanner.
